title: Berger Silk Store is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Berger Silk Store is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Silk Store are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Silk Store:
Berger Silk Store is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store!
